reference_dirs.AT3_review: AT3_review/ — READ-ONLY reference. Vendored local copy of the prior GitHub-based HITL review system (manual curation -> first review -> second review) for SDE epidemiological models. Its own nested git repo; git-ignored here; do NOT edit or commit. Includes curation-dev/ (curator notebooks + curation-template.ipynb, the de facto extraction schema). Context for the new direction: automate the curation/extraction step with OpenAI + Pydantic.

provenance_dirs.Agent Drafts: Agent Drafts/ — AI-generated/assisted output NOT yet human-validated. Agents and workflows write here, each artifact with a provenance header. First item: 2026-06-01-prior-art-and-pipeline.md.
provenance_dirs.Human validated: Human validated/ — artifacts Liz has reviewed, corrected, and stands behind. INTEGRITY BOUNDARY: agents must NOT write here; only Liz promotes a draft (with a validation note). Documents the human-in-the-loop division of labor for Liz's own work (mirrors AT3_review original->review-copy->completed).

active_focus_2026_06_01: DEFINED: automate extraction of stochastic-differential-equation (SDE) epidemiological models from academic literature into validated Pydantic schemas via OpenAI structured outputs, feeding a human-in-the-loop verification queue (the AT3_review pattern). Supersedes the earlier 'TBD' in active_focus.
active_focus: TBD — Liz will set when research begins. Topic of SDE Extraction not yet defined in repo (left intentionally for her to articulate).
